ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_generation_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "connector" TEXT /* Name of the connector used for data generation */,
  "rows_per_second" TEXT /* Rows per second to control the emit rate */,
  "number_of_rows" TEXT /* Total number of rows to emit */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the configuration is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration this field belongs to */,
  "field_index" INTEGER /* Index of the field in the configuration */,
  "kind" TEXT /* Generator type for this field (e.g., sequence, random) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the random generator (if applicable) */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the random generator (if applicable) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the field */,
  "is_nullable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the field can contain null values */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the field */,
  "constraints" TEXT /* Additional constraints for the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_fields_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES data_generation_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generators" (
  "generator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generator */,
  "generator_name" TEXT /* Name of the generator (e.g., random, sequence) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of how the generator works */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates if the generator is custom */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters required for the generator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_generation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for the generation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the generation was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the generation process (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who executed the generation */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the generation process */,
  "message" TEXT /* Additional log messages or errors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_generation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_generation_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES data_generation_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generated_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generated dataset */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used to generate this dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated dataset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who generated the dataset */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score for the dataset */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the dataset is archived */,
  "size_in_bytes" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generated_datasets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generated_datasets_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES data_generation_configs ("config_id")
)
